speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: How goes the day with us? O, tell me, Hubert.

speaker: HUBERT
text: Badly, I fear. How fares your Majesty?

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: This fever that hath troubled me so long

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: Lies heavy on me. O, my heart is sick.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: My lord, your valiant kinsman, Faulconbridge,

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Desires your Majesty to leave the field

speaker: MESSENGER
text: And send him word by me which way you go.

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: Tell him toward Swinstead, to the abbey there.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Be of good comfort, for the great supply

speaker: MESSENGER
text: That was expected by the Dauphin here

speaker: MESSENGER
text: Are wracked three nights ago on Goodwin Sands.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: This news was brought to Richard but even now.

speaker: MESSENGER
text: The French fight coldly and retire themselves.

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: Ay me, this tyrant fever burns me up

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: And will not let me welcome this good news.

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: Set on toward Swinstead. To my litter straight.

speaker:
KING
               
              JOHN
text: Weakness possesseth me, and I am faint.
